text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a little rabbit named Rosie who loved to play under the shade of the towering trees. One sunny morning, as she hopped along the winding path, she noticed a small bird sitting on a branch, looking worried.

Rosie approached the bird and asked, "What's the matter, my feathered friend? Why do you look so upset?" The bird, whose name was Tootsie, replied, "Oh, dear Rosie! I've lost my nest. It was destroyed by a storm last night, and I have nowhere to sleep or keep my babies warm."

Rosie felt a pang of sadness but also found her heart full of compassion. She quickly hopped back home and returned with some soft, fluffy leaves from the forest floor. Tootsie was overjoyed, and together they built a cozy new nest in the hollow of a tree.

As the days passed, Tootsie's babies hatched and grew strong
